Hero.sub: Digital products that actually work — native iOS & Android apps, high-performance websites and AI integrations.

Services.s1Desc: We build native iOS and Android apps from idea to App Store. Swift, Kotlin, SwiftUI — with premium UX and performance.
Services.s2Desc: Premium websites and web apps with Next.js. Lighthouse score 99, SEO optimized, lightning fast — on every device.
Services.s3Desc: Custom AI chatbots, workflow automation and LLM integration. Claude, GPT-4 and open-source — directly integrated in your products.
Services.s4Desc: You get 100% code-ownership. No lock-in, no hidden costs. Source code, repos, documentation — all yours.

Stats.lead: Honesty, quality and full control for our clients.
Stats.stat3Desc: Your code, your repos, your property. No lock-in, no hidden license costs. You own what we build — completely.

Interlude.sub: As a Spanish company we work with clients across Germany, Spain and Europe — remote, on time, in three languages.

Portfolio.lead: Real projects. Live in production. For clients in DACH and Spain.
Portfolio.p1Title: AI Interior Design — by Charline Renée
Portfolio.p1Desc: Luxury interior design iOS app with Claude AI room analysis, personalised palettes and the voice of Charline Renée.
Portfolio.p2Desc: AI-powered patient monitoring platform with real-time vital tracking, early warning system and clinical decision support.
Portfolio.p3Desc: GPT-4 powered chatbot trained on company data — integrated into web + WhatsApp Business.
Portfolio.p4Desc: Real-time tracking, order management and driver app. Web dashboard for dispatchers, iOS for drivers.

About.lead: Small. Personal. Hands-on. No agency wall between you and the people writing your code.
About.founderBio: Software developer with a passion for clean solutions. After years in enterprise projects and multiple locations, I founded Otto Solutions in Valencia in 2024 — with the goal of building digital products that actually work.
About.value1Desc: Premium code, thoughtful design, tested functionality.
About.value2Desc: Your code, your repos, your property. No lock-in.
About.value3Desc: Fast delivery without compromise on quality.
About.value4Desc: Clear communication, fair prices, realistic promises.
About.timelineLead: We're young — but with a clear plan. Here's where we come from and where we're going.

Contact.lead: Our AI assistant answers your questions — or send us an email directly.
Contact.directTitle: Looking forward to hearing from you.
Contact.freeDesc: Get to know us — no strings attached. We'll discuss your project.

CookiesPolicy.title: Cookie Policy
CookiesPolicy.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how we use them and what choices you have.
CookiesPolicy.section1Content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help save your preferences and improve the user experience.
CookiesPolicy.section2Intro: We use the following cookie categories:
CookiesPolicy.typeEssentialDesc: These cookies are required for the basic functions of the website and cannot be disabled.
CookiesPolicy.typeAnalyticsDesc: These cookies help us understand how visitors use our website.
CookiesPolicy.typeMarketingDesc: These cookies are used to show relevant advertising.
CookiesPolicy.typeMarketingNote: We do not currently use marketing cookies.
CookiesPolicy.section4Content: You can change your cookie settings at any time:
CookiesPolicy.section5Content: You can also manage cookies through your browser:

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the website and the services provided by Otto Solutions SL.
Terms.section1Content: These Terms apply to all business relationships between Otto Solutions SL and its clients. Deviating conditions of the client will not be accepted unless we expressly agree to their validity in writing.
Terms.section2Content: Otto Solutions SL provides software development services according to the specifications set out in the respective offer or contract. All delivery dates are non-binding unless expressly agreed as binding.
Terms.section3Content: Upon full payment, Otto Solutions SL transfers the agreed usage rights for the created works to the client. The source code is handed over in full. Otto Solutions SL retains the right to use general development methods and non-proprietary solutions in other projects.
Terms.section4Content: Otto Solutions SL is not liable for indirect damages, lost profits or consequential damages arising from the use of our services, unless caused by gross negligence or intent.
